description_long: This object is a tactical shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a robust and utilitarian design. It has a prominent pump-action fore-end with ribbed texturing for improved grip, and a tubular magazine running parallel beneath the barrel. The shotgun is equipped with a pistol grip instead of a traditional full stock, enhancing maneuverability in close-quarters urban environments. The receiver and barrel are both streamlined, with visible venting and rail mounts on top for potential accessory attachment. The trigger guard is rounded and slightly elongated, providing ample space for gloved fingers. Overall, the shotgun's construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for law enforcement or security use.
description: A matte black tactical pump-action shotgun with a ribbed fore-end, pistol grip, and tubular magazine, designed for urban use. Features include a rounded trigger guard and accessory rail mounts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the pump and magazine tube.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pistol grip, ribbed pump, tubular magazine, and accessory rail on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pistol grip and the symmetry of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the pump and trigger guard.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a tubular magazine beneath and visible venting on the barrel.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Rounded and slightly elongated trigger guard with a smooth contour and ample space.
